description_long: This rifle features a robust design with a wooden thumbhole stock, providing ergonomic support and a distinctive appearance. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with a prominent cylindrical scope mounted on top for precision aiming. The barrel is long and slender, extending forward with a matte black finish, and the magazine is a detachable box type located just ahead of the trigger. The rifle's stock has cut-out sections, reducing weight while maintaining structural integrity. The overall finish combines the natural wood grain of the stock with the sleek, metallic surfaces of the receiver and barrel, giving it a modern yet classic look. The muzzle appears to be unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or brake.
description: A precision rifle with a wooden thumbhole stock, mounted scope, and a long black barrel, combining wood and metal finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden thumbhole stock, mounted scope, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the scope's eyepiece.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock's cut-outs and scope.
